inputs.label: Menu Item Price
inputs.businessContext: Selling price of the menu item as listed on the menu. Based on standard menu engineering principles (Kasavana & Smith).

inputs.label: Food Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct cost of ingredients for one serving. Includes raw materials, portion cost. Standard cost accounting for restaurants.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Labor cost allocated per serving (including prep, cooking, service). Based on time-driven activity-based costing (TDABC).

inputs.label: Overhead Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Allocated overhead (rent, utilities, equipment) per serving. Standard cost allocation methods.

inputs.label: Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of food prepared that is wasted (spoilage, overproduction, plate waste). Lean manufacturing waste reduction (Muda).

inputs.label: Discount Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Average discount applied to menu item (coupons, promotions, loyalty). Revenue management.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment of final margin. Based on data quality assessment (ISO 8000).

rules: foodCostPerUnit + laborCostPerUnit + overheadCostPerUnit < menuItemPrice (otherwise negative margin)

suggestedActions: wastePercentage > 10 ? 'Implement portion control and inventory management (Lean)' : ''
discountPercentage > 10 ? 'Review discount strategy and target promotions' : ''
marginLeakPercent > 5 ? 'Conduct menu engineering to optimize pricing and cost' : ''
